calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Brown appeared by zoom for and with Sheri Castilyn by zoom.
Hussein Saffouri (Guardian Ad Litem) appeared by zoom for Giana Castilyn.

Mrs. Brown stated that she has not heard of any objections. Mr. Saffouri stated that he has no objections. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.
